MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Quidachay; Clerk: M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic is present. Represented by Wendell Davis.
Attorney Margaret Dematteo for the plaintiff.
Defendant Andrew Miller is present.
Attorney Katie Danielson appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Nils Rosenquest, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of JUN-24-2013 is vacated. (501/JPT)
